release.description: Un-skip and strengthen remaining disabled and no-op tests: implement DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCaseTest stubs, convert ForwardOnlyDataSetTest no-ops to assertThrows, implement ExcludeTableFilterTest reverse-order tests, relocate ToStringViewTest's package-blocked cases, restore commented-out unit tests in CsvParserTest/FlatXmlTableTest/BiDirectionalEdgesDepthFirstSearchTest, implement ReplacementTableTest.testGetMissingValue, add assertions to applyColumnFilters tests, fix DatabaseTestCase tear-down exceptions obscuring test failures, rewrite obsolete DbUnitTaskIT queryset test, delete two dead commented-out test fragments, stop swallowing failures in PostgreSQL xtest* methods, add CachingConnectionProvider for opt-in IDatabaseConnection reuse across test methods, reduce DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase's per-test connection churn, fix DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.runTest() losing a test failure to a cleanup exception, fix DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase column-name matching under non-English default locales
release.action: Implement the 8 empty, @Disabled DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCaseTest stub methods covering preTest, postTest, setupData, verifyData, cleanupData, and makeCompositeDataSet, using the class's existing Mockito-based connection harness. Move the test fixture's databaseTester/tc construction from field initializers to a @BeforeEach method so @Mock injection (MockitoExtension) completes before they are built.

Convert 8 empty, @Disabled ForwardOnlyDataSetTest methods into assertThrows assertions proving ForwardOnlyDataSet's documented unsupported-operation contract, matching the pattern already used by the class's other overrides.
Implement ExcludeTableFilterTest's 2 empty, @Disabled reverse-order tests, ported from the equivalent IncludeTableFilterTest methods.

Move ToStringViewTest's testStreamingTable/testXlsTable out of their dead @Disabled state into new StreamingTableToStringTest and XlsTableToStringTest classes in the same package as StreamingTable/XlsTable, since both are only visible there.

Restore 8 commented-out unit test methods across CsvParserTest, FlatXmlTableTest, and BiDirectionalEdgesDepthFirstSearchTest, migrating them to Jupiter/AssertJ. FlatXmlTableTest's unknown-column case now asserts the current, intentional NoSuchColumnException instead of the stale null-return expectation it originally encoded.

Implement ReplacementTableTest.testGetMissingValue, which previously asserted nothing, mirroring the MISSING_VALUES fixture pattern already used by the sibling FlatXmlTableTest/XlsTableTest overrides of the same inherited test.

Add real assertions to DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCaseTest.testApplyColumnFiltersBothNull/BothNotNull, which previously discarded applyColumnFilters()'s result and asserted nothing, and document via the not-null case that include filtering is applied before exclude filtering.

Add DatabaseTestCase.tearDown(Throwable), for use when a test failure is already in flight, that attaches a tear-down operation failure to the original failure via addSuppressed instead of letting it replace and hide the original. The existing no-arg tearDown() is unchanged.

Fix DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.runTest() losing the original test failure when the cleanup path (postTest(false)) also throws: attach the cleanup failure to the original via addSuppressed instead of letting it replace and hide the real test failure, mirroring DatabaseTestCase.tearDown(Throwable).

Rewrite DbUnitTaskIT's obsolete queryset id/refid test: it asserted the old behavior of throwing a BuildException when both attributes are set, but Ant resolves refid first and no longer errors on the combination; the test now asserts today's actual, no-throw behavior.

Delete two commented-out test fragments that encoded no restorable behavior: InsertOperationIT's testExecuteNullAsNone referenced DatabaseConfig.FEATURE_NULL_AS_NONE, which does not exist anywhere in production code (an apparently never-implemented feature; the NO_VALUE-omission behavior it targeted is already covered by testExecute_withNoValueFields_omitsNoValueColumnsFromInsertSql in InsertOperationTest), and DatabaseDataSetIT's testGetTableNamesAndCaseSensitive was two lines cut off mid-statement with no coherent assertion, probing raw DatabaseMetaData introspection that dbunit's own case-sensitivity handling (FEATURE_CASE_SENSITIVE_TABLE_NAMES) does not use.

Rename the stale JUnit3-era xtest*-prefixed methods in PostgresSQLOidIT, PostgresqlUuidIT, and SQLHelperDomainPostgreSQLIT to test*, and remove the try/catch wrapper around each body that reported a nonsense fixed message instead of the real failure whenever a non-assertion exception occurred (AssertionError is not an Exception, so real assertion failures already propagated normally; only the underlying operation's own failures were obscured). Verified against a Dockerized postgres:16.3.

Add CachingConnectionProvider: an opt-in, thread-safe cache for one IDatabaseConnection (and therefore its metadata cache) that detects a dead or expired connection and transparently replaces it instead of returning it or failing. Wire it into JdbcDatabaseTester, DataSourceDatabaseTester, JndiDatabaseTester, PropertiesBasedJdbcDatabaseTester, and DefaultDatabaseTester via new, additive constructor overloads, making the existing manual DefaultDatabaseTester + NO_OP_OPERATION_LISTENER reuse pattern safe to opt into without hand-wiring a static connection field. Update the FAQ's performance and keep-connection-open entries accordingly. Verified against hsqldb, h2, derby, and postgresql.

Reduce DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase's per-test connection churn: setupData(), verifyData(), and cleanupData() now share one IDatabaseConnection acquired lazily and closed once by cleanupData(), instead of each step acquiring and often closing its own; configureTest() caches its resolved FEATURE_CASE_SENSITIVE_TABLE_NAMES value so cleanupData() no longer needs a second connection just to re-read it. Together these cut a 4-5-connection-per-test lifecycle down to 1-2. Add setCloseConnectionAfterTest(boolean), defaulting to true, so a databaseTester sharing a CachingConnectionProvider across test methods can opt this class out of closing a connection other tests still expect to reuse. Verified against all 9 supported databases (hsqldb, h2, derby, postgresql, mysql, mssql, db2, oracle-18, oracle-23).

Fix DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.makeExpectedTableColumns() column-name matching to use Locale.ENGLISH instead of the JVM default locale, so a Turkish default locale's dotless-i no longer breaks matching differently-cased ASCII column names, matching DatabaseDataSet.SchemaSet.normalizeSchema's existing convention.

release.description: Performance improvements and fixes: speed up column index lookups, suppress RowOutOfBoundsException stack traces, buffer XML, CSV, DTD, and YAML output, cache DecimalFormat in XlsTable, restore DepthFirstSearch tests, fix DepthFirstSearch depth limit, cache DatabaseSequenceFilter dependency edges, topological sort in DatabaseSequenceFilter, single column-metadata fetch in ResultSetTableMetaData, precompute sort keys in SortedTable, reduce assertion loop overhead, reduce ReplacementTable scanning, flatten CompositeDataSet table merging, detect columns without exception flow in FlatXmlProducer, fix PrimaryKeyFilter result set leak, fix XlsDataSetWriter memory leak, skip timezone regex for plain timestamps, guard hot-path debug logging, fix SQLHelper result set leak, reuse query metadata in QueryTableIterator, fix XlsDataSet file stream leak, release consumed CSV rows early, lookup map for OrderedTableNameMap original names, primitive row index storage in RowFilterTable, set-based membership in Columns.mergeColumnsByName, extend ResultSetTableMetaData column-metadata cache to MySqlMetadataHandler and Db2MetadataHandler, fix XlsDataSetWriter StringIndexOutOfBoundsException for BigDecimal scale greater than 52, restore execution of 45 test methods silenced by missing @Test annotations, fix corrupted assertion in HandlersTest
release.action: Update github_actions dependency actions/checkout from 6 to 7 (#756).
Update maven dependency org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-failsafe-plugin from 3.5.5 to 3.5.6 (#748).
Update maven dependency org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-surefire-plugin from 3.5.5 to 3.5.6 (#748).
Update maven dependency org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-surefire-report-plugin from 3.5.5 to 3.5.6 (#748).
Update maven dependency com.oracle.database.xml:xdb from 23.7.0.25.01 to 23.26.2.0.0 (#749).
Update maven dependency com.oracle.database.xml:xmlparserv2 from 23.7.0.25.01 to 23.26.2.0.0 (#750).
Update maven dependency org.sonatype.central:central-publishing-maven-plugin from 0.10.0 to 0.11.0 (#757).
Update maven dependency com.github.siom79.japicmp:japicmp-maven-plugin from 0.26.0 to 0.26.1 (#758).
Update maven dependency ch.qos.logback:logback-classic from 1.5.32 to 1.5.34 (#759).
Update maven dependency org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter from 6.1.0 to 6.1.1 (#761).
Update maven dependency org.junit.platform:junit-platform-suite-engine from 6.1.0 to 6.1.1 (#761).
Update maven dependency ch.qos.logback:logback-classic from 1.5.34 to 1.5.37 (#762).
Update maven dependency org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin from 0.8.14 to 0.8.15 (#763).
Update maven dependency com.ibm.db2:jcc from 12.1.0.0 to 12.1.5.0 (#764).
Speed up per-cell column index lookups with an exact-case fast path in AbstractTableMetaData.
Stop capturing stack traces in RowOutOfBoundsException end-of-rows control flow; the exception no longer carries a stack trace.
Buffer XML output in XmlWriter; callers must close or flush the writer to guarantee complete output.
Buffer CSV file output in CsvDataSetWriter.
Buffer DTD and YAML dataset output.
Cache DecimalFormat instances per format string in XlsTable numeric cell reads.
Restore execution of DepthFirstSearch tests that silently stopped running under JUnit Jupiter.
Enforce the search depth limit in DepthFirstSearch; direct-dependency lookups no longer include transitive tables.
Cache dependency edges during DatabaseSequenceFilter sorting, eliminating repeated JDBC metadata queries.
Replace quadratic table ordering in DatabaseSequenceFilter with a topological sort; ambiguous orders may differ but remain valid.
Fetch result set column metadata once per table instead of once per column (DefaultMetadataHandler only).
Precompute sort keys in SortedTable instead of re-converting values on every comparison.
Reduce per-cell overhead in the assertion comparison loop (hoisted row count, guarded debug logging).
Reduce replacement scanning overhead in ReplacementTable.
Flatten same-name table merging in CompositeDataSet from nested pairs to a single composite.
Detect columns without exception-based control flow in FlatXmlProducer.
Close result sets per iteration in PrimaryKeyFilter scans instead of leaking them.
Release workbook cell style cache entries after XLS write, fixing a memory leak.
Skip the timezone-suffix regex match in TimestampDataType.typeCast for strings that cannot possibly contain a timezone suffix.
Guard hot-path debug logging in PreparedBatchStatement, SimplePreparedStatement, AutomaticPreparedBatchStatement, and InsertOperation.
Close the result set in SQLHelper.getPrimaryKeyColumn and raise a clear SQLException when the table has no primary key.
Reuse the cached table in QueryTableIterator.getTableMetaData instead of separately querying the database, also fixing a result set leak in the previous implementation.
Close the internal file stream in the XlsDataSet(File) constructor instead of leaking it; buffer it while open.
Release each CSV row read by CsvProducer as soon as it is handed to the dataset consumer, instead of retaining the full parsed file in memory alongside the CachedDataSet being built from it.
Replace the linear scan in OrderedTableNameMap.getOriginalTableName with a lookup map populated at add() time.
Store RowFilterTable's filtered row index mapping as a primitive int array instead of boxed Integer objects.
Replace the O(n*m^2) nested scan and List.remove(Object) in Columns.mergeColumnsByName with set-based membership.

Extend ResultSetTableMetaData's per-table column-metadata cache to MySqlMetadataHandler and Db2MetadataHandler via a new IMetadataHandler.matchesColumn()/supportsColumnCache() capability, instead of only DefaultMetadataHandler.

Build the zero-padding format string in XlsDataSetWriter from the actual BigDecimal scale instead of substring-ing a fixed 52-character constant, which threw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException for scale greater than 52. Cap the padding length to avoid unbounded growth for a pathological scale, and deprecate the now-unused ZEROS constant.

Restore execution of 45 test methods across 22 classes that silently never ran under JUnit Jupiter: JUnit3-era overrides of inherited/abstract test methods and @Disabled-only methods missing the required @Test annotation.
Fix corrupted expected-value string in HandlersTest.testEmptyQuotedAndUnquotedFieldsParser, exposed once the test began executing.

release.description: GH action updates, extract UTs from ITs, rename test methods, add DataSetBuilder, improve test infra, improve UT coverage, bump HSQLDB, improve IT coverage, fix table lookup with case-sensitive databases, fix metadata table name lookups, convert UTs to ITs, OracleSdoGeometryDataType test coverage, fix ScrollableResultSetTable, document profile unsupportedFeatures, correct profile unsupportedFeatures, configure DB2, fix SQLHelper NPE, fix TruncateTableOperation for DB2
release.action: Update github_actions dependency actions/deploy-pages from 4 to 5 (#27).
Update github_actions dependency actions/setup-java from 4 to 5 (#27).
Update github_actions dependency actions/upload-pages-artifact from 3 to 5 (#27).
Update github_actions dependency dependabot/fetch-metadata from 2 to 3 (#27).
Extract mock-based tests, runnable without a database, from IT classes into standalone unit test classes.
Rename test methods across all test classes to follow the test_condition_outcome naming convention.
Add DataSetBuilder for easing in-memory data set creation.
Improve test infrastructure by adding InMemoryDatabaseConnection and MockBatchStatement, and updating MockStatementFactory.
Add many unit tests to improve unit test coverage.
Bump HSQLDB from 1.8.0.10 to 2.7.4 and update DDL and driver references for JDBC 4.0 compliance.
Add many integration tests to improve integration test coverage.
Fix table lookup failure with case-sensitive databases when creating DatabaseTableMetaData.
Escape SQL LIKE wildcard characters in table name metadata lookups and normalize table names to stored case in FK dependency searches.
Use database profile connection in FK-graph and pattern tests instead of hardcoded HSQLDB connections.
Skip case-sensitive table name tests on databases that do not support mixed-case quoted identifiers.
Add Mockito unit test and live Oracle integration test for OracleSdoGeometryDataType.getSqlValue, verifying null geometry returns the "NULL" sentinel and non-null geometry returns a parseable string.

Fix ScrollableResultSetTable IDatabaseConnection-based constructors that always obtained a TYPE_FORWARD_ONLY statement, making scrollable result set support permanently broken. Rename ScrollableResultSetTableTest to ScrollableResultSetTableIT, add H2-based tests that prove the break and verify the fix, and remove SCROLLABLE_RESULTSET from the Oracle and H2 unsupported-feature lists.
Document all valid dbunit.profile.unsupportedFeatures values with descriptions and per-database support matrix; fix stale H2 example that incorrectly listed SCROLLABLE_RESULTSET as unsupported.

Correct unsupportedFeatures in derby-dbunit.properties (remove TRANSACTION, SCROLLABLE_RESULTSET, TRUNCATE_TABLE), h2-dbunit.properties (remove TRUNCATE_TABLE), and hsqldb-dbunit.properties (remove TRUNCATE_TABLE); update site doc table and H2 example accordingly.

Configure DB2 in build infrastructure: migrate to icr.io/db2_community/db2:11.5.9.0 (ibmcom/db2 is deprecated); add db2-11-5 to database-profiles.txt and GitHub Actions CI matrix (30-minute timeout); configure Docker container with DB2INSTANCE env var, privileged mode (required for kernel IPC resources), AUTOCONFIG=false/UPDATEAVAIL=NO (shorter startup), tmpfs on /database (eliminates transaction log fsync overhead), and db2-tune.sh to increase LOGBUFSZ and disable SOFTMAX; set db2-dbunit.properties schema=DBUNIT (DB2 stores identifiers as uppercase), unsupportedFeatures, and multiLineSupport; add Db2Environment setting Db2DataTypeFactory, Db2MetadataHandler, and enabling batch statements; add NOT NULL to PK columns in shared test DDL files (DB2 requires explicit NOT NULL on PK columns); update site doc.
Fix NullPointerException in SQLHelper.schemaExists() and catalogExists() when the JDBC driver returns null TABLE_SCHEM or TABLE_CAT values, as DB2 does.

Fix TruncateTableOperation for DB2: add protected getDeleteAllCommandSuffix hook to DeleteAllOperation and override it in TruncateTableOperation to append IMMEDIATE, which DB2 requires in every TRUNCATE TABLE statement.

Fix TimestampDataType.setSqlValue() to pass a Calendar matching the dataset timezone offset when setting a timestamp with timezone info, preventing the JDBC driver from applying the JVM local timezone and storing the wrong wall-clock time.

release.description: Lower DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase log levels, build DB config, GitHub CI, reproducible builds, change to Central Portal publishing, IsActualGreaterThanExpectedWithIgnoreMillisValueComparer, IsActualGreaterThanOrEqualToExpectedWithIgnoreMillisValueComparer, GitHub config, convert docs to Asciidoc, version bumps, DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.runTestSteps(), auto-publish SNAPSHOTS
release.action: Configure GitHub CI.
Update build to use docker-maven-plugin for starting databases.
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase: lower log levels so no WARN and fewer INFO.
Setup reproducible builds.
Change Central artifact publishing from OSSRH to new Portal.
Add IsActualGreaterThanExpectedWithIgnoreMillisValueComparer.
Add IsActualGreaterThanOrEqualToExpectedWithIgnoreMillisValueComparer.
Convert APT and XDoc doc files to Asciidoc.
Generate and publish Maven site to GitHub pages.
Bump multiple plugin and lib versions.
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase: extract runTestSteps() from runTest() enabling customization in child classes.
Auto-publish SNAPSHOTs to Maven Central on master commits.

release.description: JUnit 5 update, ValueComparers constants, Add TableDecoratorDataSet and GeneratedColumnFilter, Postgresql dep scope, IOUtils NoClassDefFoundError, PostgreSQLOidDataType.setSqlValue(): use unwrap(), Oracle NClob, XML DataTypes: use unwrap()
release.action: Upgrade dbUnit from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5
Add 'actual is null' and 'actual is not null' constants to ValueComparers class
Add TableDecoratorDataSet and GeneratedColumnFilterSupport enabling column filtering from datasets, such as computed columns
Mark postgresql dependency as provided scope
Fix NoClassDefFoundError for IOUtils
Update code for Modernizer plugin violations
In PostgreSQLOidDataType.setSqlValue(), use connection.unwrap() to get PGConnection.
In OracleNClobDataType.setSqlValue() and OracleXMLTypeDataType.setSqlValue(), use connection.unwrap() to get statement or resultset.
Configure Maven Wrapper for dbUnit builds.

release.description: YAML dataset
release.action: Add support for YAML dataset format

release.description: new ValueComparers, unwrap PGConnection, Timestamp DST, UUID NPE, OracleClobDataType CCE, Operation multiple dataset sources, PostGIS 2021.1.0
release.action: Enable composing an Operation dataset from multiple source files
OracleClobDataType: Use non-deprecated CLOB; also prevents ClassCastException
Nullable UUID column in PostgreSQL caused NPE
Timestamp conversion for instants during daylight saving time is off
Unwrap PGConnection instead of casting to it
Add 'actual is null' and 'actual is not null' ValueComparers
Upgrade PostGIS JDBC driver to 2021.1.0

release.description: DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase getConnection(), more case sensitive tables
release.action: DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase must use correct getConnection() to initialize DatabaseConfig
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase must use DatabaseConfig.FEATURE_CASE_SENSITIVE_TABLE_NAMES: in cleanupData()

release.description: Apache POI 4.1.0, Maven relativePath warning, UniqueIdentifierType: change caught exception for Java 12, Set some dependencies optional, Remove commons-io, commons-collections deps, case sensitive tables
release.action: Update Apache POI to version 4.1.0
Eliminate the Maven's relativePath warning
UniqueIdentifierType: change caught exception for Java 12's changed UUID validation
Use optional in poi-ooxml and postgresql Maven dependencies
Use optional in junit and hamcrest Maven dependencies
Remove commons-io dependency
Remove commons-collections dependency
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase must use DatabaseConfig.FEATURE_CASE_SENSITIVE_TABLE_NAMES: in configureTest()

release.description: DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.makeAdditionalColumnInfo NPE, PostgreSQL driver update, DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.verifyData() sorting, Relative date/time syntax, Travis CI, Fix MSSQL identity column filter, Fix CachedDataSet, IsActualContainingExpectedStringValueComparer, Fix FilteredDataSet case sensitivity, Fix DatabaseDataSet schema normalisation, Fix IsActualWithinToleranceOfExpectedTimestampValueComparer value casting, MSSQL datetimeoffset, Fix FlatXml set null value for different column name cases
release.action: NPE in DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.makeAdditionalColumnInfo when excludeColumns is null
Update PostgreSQL driver version
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.verifyData() sorts table columns by Strings
Add new syntax to set relative date, time, and timestamp in dataset
Setup public CI
IllegalArgumentException when setting PROPERTY_IDENTITY_COLUMN_FILTER
CachedDataSet does not work
Add IsActualContainingExpectedStringValueComparer comparing if actual contains expected
FilteredDataSet does not inherit case sensitivity of wrapped set
DatabaseDataSet SchemaSet ignores case sensitivity setting in normalizing schema names
IsActualWithinToleranceOfExpectedTimestampValueComparer assumes values are represented as Timestamps
Add support for MSSQL's datetimeoffset data type
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.runTest(): catch Throwable instead of Exception
Update Oracle Dependency to ojdbc8 from Maven Central
Fix null values being inserted when a column is referenced with different casing

release.description: ValueComparers, PostgreSQL OID, POI 3.17, Java 8 tests, database integration tests, changes links, devguide.apt created, dbunit.properties, expected and definition tables verifier, JavaDoc gen, JDK 8
release.action: DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase, VerifyTableDefinition: support ValueComparer.
ValueComparer: DbUnitAssert: add assert method that strategizes the compare algorithm on a per column basis.
Add Dockerfiles for running ITs: MySQL, Oracle 11, Postgres and SQL Server
Fix JavaDoc gen
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase: VerifyTableDefinitions and expected tables can silently mismatch, add ExpectedDataSetAndVerifyTableDefinitionVerifier
Change build to use Java 8 compiler and target 1.8: update compileSource to 1.8.
DatabaseEnvironment loads dbunit.properties. See "Integration Tests" page for docs.
Convert devguide.xml to devguide.apt.
Fixed documentation regarding the blob tags.
Fix changes report tracker links (Bugs, Features) to support both.
Fix all (except one Oracle test) database integration tests to work again.
Update tests to support build running Java 8.
CachedDataSet has redundant code.
FlatDtdDataSet has redundant code.
Use Apache POI 3.17.
Add PostgreSQL OID data type.

release.description: Doc update, MSSQL IdentityInsertOperation commits, streamed export, blobs in datasets
release.action: DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase: Don't verify table data when test execution has errors.
Cannot insert null values via jTDS (regression from 374).
Blobs are now easier to define in flat XML dataset and CSV files using [text <encoding>], [base64] and [file] cues. See Data Types doc page.
Fix Ohloh to the update Open Hub terminology.
Streamed export does not work when it launched from Ant.
MSSQL IdentityInsertOperation.execute erroneously always commits.
Outdated link on Configurable Features and Properties page.

release.description: DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase config, TimestampDataType.typeCast(), escape pattern for table name, DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.verifyData() connection, XlsTable timezone, OracleXMLType, 'true' 'false' for numeric fields, XlsDataSetWriter cellstyle caching, ForeignKeyRelationshipEdge.compareTo, new CI, POM cleanup, ReplacementDataSet and DbUnitAssert case sensitive table names, XmlWriter
release.action: Any characters with code greater than 7f are written to XML attribute value as entity.
DbUnitAssert table name case sensitive problems.
ReplacementDataSet "ignores" its decorated DataSet's caseSensitiveTableNames setting.
Broken links to issues referenced in changes-report.html.
POM cleanup: remove "official" profile, consolidate config.
Update site with new CI server info: http://dbunit.intertech.com/jenkins
Can not obtain relations from several columns.
Running out of cell styles in XlsDataSetWriter.
Allow 'false' -> 0 and 'true' -> 1 for numeric fields.
Unable to insert row with Oracle XMLType.
Add test showing XlsTable timezone issue first reported in issue 280.
Don't add timezone offset for XlsTable.
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase.verifyData() uses databaseTester.getConnection() and should use DatabaseTestCase.getConnection().
AbstractDatabaseConnection.createTable(String) ignores escape pattern for table name.
TimestampDataType.typeCast() fails on non-local timezones.
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase doesn't handle all DatabaseConfig access approaches, missing dbUnit lifecycle steps.

release.description: Lost dbunit.org, toString() tables, respect DEFAULTs, multi-schema, PrepAndExpectedTestCaseSteps
release.action: Multi schema support in FlatXmlDataSets.
Do not explicitly insert null into NOT NULL columns with DEFAULT.
Add toString() to XlsTable and StreamingIterator.
dbunit.org domain owner did not renew it; fix links.
Make AbstractDataFileLoader.loadDataSet public and pull up to DataFileLoader interface.
Postgres CITEXT data type support.
Add PrepAndExpectedTestCaseSteps for lambdas and eliminating try/catch/finally template for PrepAndExpectedTestCase.

release.description: allowEmptyFields property, column aliases POI 3.11,
release.action: Upgrade Apache POI library from "3.2-FINAL" to "3.11". Pull request 6, Enhancement 161.
dBUnit does not pick up column aliases.
Add allowEmptyFields feature flag/property to prevent fail-fast and allow empty string fields.
BigIntegerDataType.setSqlValue() NPE when value is null.

release.description: CSV dataset, PostGres, Sonatype OSSRH, logging, Java 1.5, MySQL, UUIDs, autoincrement, DTD implied columns
release.action: Use Sonatype OSSRH for snapshots and release sync to Central.
Add Postgres Geometry Type.
CsvURLProducer swallows exception stack.
Trim CSV file column names.
DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase: Log exceptions for setupData, verifyData, cleanupData to help diagnosis of data problems.
Fail fast and clearly when column value has no value; throws IllegalArgumentException.
Update SLF4J and LogBack to latest versions.
Update compileSource to 1.5.
Update JUnit version to 4.11.
H2DataTypeFactory does not properly support UUID data type.
DBUnit 2.4.9 needs java 6 to run.
MySqlDataTypeFactory saves TINYINT(1) as String.
Special dataset syntax for UUIDs mapped to binary fields.
Broken link on http://www.dbunit.org/issue-tracking.html.
SQLHelper Oracle Issue (autoincrement metadata problem).
Columns with defaults should be #IMPLIED in generated DTD.

release.description: Additional toString()s, schema name usage, logging, timestamp, unique ID, table name in Operation exceptions, build with JDK 6.
release.action: Change build to use current compiler on path vs 1.4. This is first dbUnit release done with JDK 6. If you encounter problems, please open a bug tracker item.
Add toString() methods to AbstractResultSetTable, ForwardOnlyResultSetTable, ScrollableResultSetTable, ColumnFilterTable.
For DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase, catch, log, and rethrow all log messages to help with troubleshooting. Tweak log messages. Improve doc example.
Add schema name, if specified, to table name in query in AbstractDatabaseConnection.createTable().
New Handling of Timestamp in 2.4.8 has error with subseconds
AbstractDatabaseConnection createQueryTable throws UOEx.
Provides support for the uniqueidentifier type in Microsoft SQLServer.
To help troubleshooting, add table name to Operation exceptions: refresh, delete, insert, update.

release.description: Bug fixes, timezone support, Oracle support improvements, new DataFileLoader, new PrepAndExpectedTestCase
release.action: MSSQL JDBC Driver 3.0 doesn't work well
NPE when setting properties
Wrong value for property "datatypeFactory"
Added driver for Mckoi db.
SQL: "Create Domain" ... Data Types are not supported.
Additional refinements for Oracle SDO_GEOMETRY datatype
Add timezone support for timestamp data type
OracleDataTypeFactory recognises "SYS.XMLTYPE"
Add "file loader" utility (DataFileLoader) for various data file types
Add new TestCase that supports prepare and expected datasets: "DefaultPrepAndExpectedTestCase"

release.description: Bugfixes and some non breaking refactoring
release.action: dtd for XmlDataSet
Column sensing not available for InputStream
DatabaseSequenceFilter fails on case sensitive tables
DB2 problem with schema names
Handle non-typical characters in xml encoding
Fix integration tests
FK table sorting does not work with cross-schema FKs
Replaced reflection-based Oracle data types with static calls
Add support for Oracle SDO_GEOMETRY datatype
Improvements to the ant operation task
MsSqlDataTypeFactory does not support MS SQL 2005 NTEXT

release.description: Bugfixes and some database specific additions
release.action: Add support for interval type on postgres
Changed some verbose logging statements from INFO to DEBUG level
DefaultDataSet is incompatible w/ AbstractDataSet's IDataSet
XlsTable - empty excel columns cause problem
Support for Postgres' inet types
primaryFilterKey is not always respected
Nullable tinyint on mysql cannot be inserted
Unify dbunit features and properties
Support for Postgresql Enum
DB2 problem with schema names
Support for Oracle ROWID
AbstractTableMetaData hardcoded dependency on IDataTypeFactory
Numbers with more than 19 digits cannot be saved in a BIGINT column
Sybace - SQLHelper.getDatabaseInfo exception getDatabaseMajorVersion()
DBUnit support for Netezza database

release.description: Bugfixes and some few additions
release.action: Add Excel support to Export
MySQL - NoSuchTableException
Have DbUnitAssert use JUnit only if present
Oracle BINARY_DOUBLE+BINARY_FLOAT support
specify the schema via the api
XslTableTest.testDifferentDatatypes() fails (in trunk)
Breaking change and likely bug in XlsTable.java
Support for UUID data type Postgresql

release.description: Bugfixes, some small additions
release.action: Better extensibility for XmlDataSetWriter
XlsDataSet.write
Mysql FEATURE_QUALIFIED_TABLE_NAMES column SQLHelper.matches
overridden setUpDatabaseConfig not called
DB2 problem after 2.4
Mysql Linux metatdata UpperCase Comparison
JTDS Driver causes warning in class AbstractTableMetaData
Add DatabaseConnection methods to support PreparedStatements

release.description: Bugfixes, some small additions
release.action: Simplify use of custom datatype factory for DBTestCase
problem when verifying against an XmlDataSet
IDENTITY_INSERT : Check for identity column incorrect
possibly i18n problem
FailureHandler is not propagated to data comparison stage
Warning message "PostgreSQL not be supported"
short BLOB are not correctly managed
MySQL AmbiguousTableNameException incorrectly thrown
TableName pattern filtering

release.description: Bugfixes, some small additions
release.action: Cannot extract contents of table with a column named "AS"
MySQL case sensitive problem in dataset creation
Add StringIgnoreCase DataType
FEATURE_CASE_SENSITIVE_TABLE_NAMES doesn't work completely (fixed wrong DatabaseConfig property)
org.dbunit.dataset.datatype.TypeCastException
SLF4J maven dependencies aren't quite correct
Include table name in cyclic dependency exception
Insert fails on Oracle multiple schemas

release.description: Updates and bugfixes only
release.action: Updated slf4j dependencies to version 1.5.6.
No metadata Tables found
Oracle problem rel 2.4 in createQueryTable
Cannot insert table data with self-reference in 2.4.0

release.description: Some API changes, features added, bugfixes
release.action: Refactor Assertion class
When comparing empty tables, column info should be ignored
Added "constants" for DatabaseOperation wrappers
ISearchAlgorithm.search returns strongly typed ListOrderedSet instead of a normal Set so that TableDependencyHelper can return tables in correct order. API change.
XmlWriter can't write nested CDATA sections
XMLType Support for Oracle - Again
QueryDataSet does not cache query results - Implies API change - new method IDatabaseConnection.createTable(String tableName)
Fail-Fast if AmbiguousTableNames found
[PATCH] Support Oracle SQLLoader files for datasets - refactored the CSV Pipeline infrastructure so that it can be reused for sqlldr files
Updated apache commons-collections from 3.1 to 3.2.1
BigDecimal values read by XlsDataSet have wrong precision
give tolerated delta as percentage in floating-point compare
Remove commons-lang dependency
DbUnitTask#createConnection
FlatDtdProducer does not support Element dataset ANY
tinyint being ignored
DBUnit does not recognise "Unsigned" INTEGER columns
FlatXMLdataSet counts 14 tables instead of 1 table of 14 row
Better reporting of extra columns in FlatXmlProducer
BufferedConsumer never cleans _allRows
new SortedTable throws NoSuchColumnException
QueryDataSet does not cache query results
problem because tableName is case insensitive
DatabaseSequenceFilter infinite loop on cyclic dependency
Performance improvement in Assertions.assertEquals(ITable expected, ITable actual) - Lookup the DataTypes for every column only once and not for every single row
Field forgot under insert step - enabled columnSensing feature for ant task when format "flat" is used
Need a way to NOT pretty format xml
Additional column info also for filtered columns
QuerySet docs (includes little refactoring)
add primaryKeyFilter-Property in ant
Make configuration elements settable in ant (see 2041400)
Choose encoding for ant export task
Share transaction with InsertIdentityOp.
New Datatype MySqlDataTypeFactory
Remove JUnit dependency
Provide the complete diff of 2 tables
MySqlDataTypeFactory incorrectly maps TinyInt

Excel processing error - update from POI-3.1-FINAL to POI-3.2-FINAL. Date values are read/written as Numeric values for now since the POI Date handling is not consistent (i.e. write Date and read the written Date do not provide equal Date objects).
dataset generated with getAllDependentTables contradicts DTD
MetaData get() are Pattern-Like
Improvements on HxxxxDataFactory

release.description: Some API changes, features added, bugfixes, performance improvements in assertions. See migration guide for additional help
release.action: Trimming is now done on Excel column names to prevent NoSuchColumnException.
Patch for Bug #1421590 "Problem in data import if all the columns are not populated"
NoSuchColumnException now thrown when column name does not exist.
Patch: some extra comparison methods for Assertion.
Assertion.equals to provide more info about failure
StreamingDataSet.toString() now returning default value rather UnsupportedOperationException.
Performance optimization getColumnIndex() - Implies API change: new method ITableMetaData.getColumnIndex
Support RowFilter on ITable
support for tolerated delta in floating-point comparisons - Implies API change: new method IDataTypeFactory.createDataType(int sqlType, String sqlTypeName, String tableName, String columnName)
Added batchSize as a parameter.
Excel support in Ant task
Bad comparison in SortedTable
Added fetchSize as a parameter.
ReplacementTable - allow fail if value not replaced
Fixing erroneous logger.error in BytesDataType.typeCast().
Refactoring of column-related methods.
TablesDependencyHelper with Oracle schema bug - Implies API change - the constructors of DatabaseConnection throw a DatabaseUnitException if the connection/schema are not valid
Assertion: replace Assert.fail with ComparisonFailure
Alternative support for CLOB and BLOB in Oracle 11 JDBC
datatypeFactory documentation note needed
getAllDependentTables ORA-01000: maximum open cursors exceed
getAllDependentTables didn't work with full qualified names
Added constructors to NoSuchColumnException taking table name and column name as arguments - set old constructors to deprecated

Exception in DTD generation - Implies API behaviour change. DatabaseTableMetaData.getColumns() does not throw a NoColumnsFoundExcepion anymore but returns an empty Column[] when a table does not have any dbunit-supported columns

Assertion.equals provides more information than just the column count when a column mismatch between expected and result tables was found. All columns are reported so that the user can see immediately which columns are missing

Write validation message when the configured IDataTypeFactory probably does not match to the current database system. The validation implicitly takes place when AbstractTableMetaData.getDataTypeFactory() is invoked.
Maven pom.xml updates: Added ciManagement section, added some plugins for reporting
Test error: testExportWithQuerySet
Topological sorting of tables when exporting
Use DataType.BLOB instead of DataType.LONGVARBINARY

DbUnit is only JDK 1.4 compatible and not 1.3 (as claimed until now). Several methods are in use that did not exist in JDK 1.3. To build with JDK 1.4 and maven it is now required to set the environment variable JAVA_1_4_HOME to your JDK 1.4 home directory
Update apache POI to latest release (2.5.1 -> 3.1)
Inserting of clobs fails
method getRowCount don't use schema.
Column count for empty XlsDataSet returns 0.
Values with newlines cannot be compared with assertEquals.
Infinite wait in StreamingIterator.
Types.BOOLEAN not recognized.
"compare" + "table" tag throw NoSuchTableException - added more information about the cause to the thrown exception.
DTD Creation and Parsing - throw meaningful exception if DTD ELEMENT declaration is missing.
Added more information in case of a wrong configured DataTypeFactory.

release.description: Bugfixing release
release.action: Missing License file in distribution jars
Removed redundant and erroneous ERROR logging.
Memory leak.
A warning message is now displayed when rows contain more columns than the first row.

release.description: Bugfixing release
release.action: End of table name cut off when bracketed in FlatDtdProducer
IncompatibleClassChangeError with 2.2.1
junit jar-file should be JDK 1.4 compatible
Version 2.2-dev, Java 1.4 compatibility issue
Changed logger.error into logger.debug when the exception can be disregarded.
Fixed issue with CLOB datatype in Derby.

release.description: Another official release after a long, long time...
release.action: Added SLF4J dependency and logging statements
Removed JUnit dependency on IDatabaseTester implementations
Created H2 data factory
New point Datatype on MySqlDataTypeFactory
Improvements on M2 build - Additional files
NPE in FlatDtdProducer.java at line 224
Bug in XmlWriter / escapeXml
Database schema with escape pattern doesn't work
Misleading error reported by RowOutOfBoundsException
NPE In InsertIdentityOperation
DataSourceDatabaseTest does not use setSchema()
Columns in ORDER BY Not Quoted
ReplacementTable broken for multiple replacements
Null pointer exception in FlatXMLDataSet.write(compositeDS)
Null pointer exception in FlatXMLDataSet.write(compositeDS)
Problem with Oracle 10g Recyclebin

release.description: First official release in a long, long time...
release.action: Enable TestCase compositions
Migrate SCM to Subversion
Support for MySQL 5.0 boolean datatype
Added pom.xml so it can be built by Maven 2.
XmlDataSetWriter now has a flag to include column's name as comment.
Added org.dbunit.util.search and org.dbunit.database.search packages, whose classes can be used to search tables depedencies for a given table.
Add "transaction" attribute to ant tasks to wrap operations in a single transaction. Can make operations faster.
Typo in howto example
Properly support writing NCLOBs to Oracle
Support CSV files from a URL (e.g. jar file) + CSV fixes
Fix the driver in classpath/driver not in classpath to always work regardless of configured driver.
Typo in test class AbstractDataSetTest
new HsqldbDataTypeFactory for working with booleans in HsqlDB.

release.description: Multiple bugfixes and enhancements.
release.action: 741394 - New database compare Ant tag. See Ant task documentation.
New Comma Separated Values (CSV) dataset implementation.
824328 & 948479 - Ability to add DOCTYPE declaration when writing a flat Xml dataset. See FAQ.
884422 - FlatDtdWriter has now the ability to generate DTDs with choice model instead of sequence model.
Ability to import external file for binary data types like BLOB; the value can be either a qualified URL or a file path name.
Do not omit NULL values anymore in INSERT statements. Now only XmlDataSet's <none/> tag are omitted. With FlatXmlDataSet you must use the ReplacementDataSet to achieve the same behavior.
937732 - XlsDataSet now use UTF-16 encoding to support Asian characters. Patch submitted by Shuhei Kondo.
Applied XlsTable empty table detection patch submitted by Deepak Kaimal.
Added back FlatXmlDataSet constructors taking URL as argument missing in version 2.0.
918631 & 925585 - Fixed FlatXmlDataSet constructors taking InputStream/Reader for loading DTD.
DELETE_ALL operation now deletes tables only *once* in reverse order they are encountered. Before, duplicate tables were resulting in multiple deletes. Patch submitted by John Hurst.
DELETE_ALL operation now compatible with StreamingDataSet.
947330 - Now closing ResultSet before Statement to fix exceptions thrown by the Firebird JDBC driver and the OpenBase 8.0 JDBC driver.
921869 - Fixed ParameterIndexOutOfBoundsException with InterBase.
947809 - Moved createMetaData() static method from AbstractResultSet to DatabaseTableMetaData and made it public. Can now be used to create ITable from a ResultSet.
Support for large Oracle BLOB. Must use OracleDataTypeFactory.
Oracle LONG RAW data type support via OracleDataTypeFactory. Original patch submitted by Markus Muller.
Added back support for Oracle FLOAT missing in DbUnit 2.0. Must use OracleDataTypeFactory.
Support for Oracle NCHAR2 as proposed by Deepak Kaimal. Must use OracleDataTypeFactory.
Added DataType.isDateTime() method proposed by Ayman Mahfouz.
726366 & 884422 - Added IColumnFilter interface. Can be used to filter out some table columns. See FAQ.
Renamed ITableFilter.isValidName() method to accept() to be consistent with the new IColumnFilter interface.
955354 - Ability to determine the primary keys with IColumnFilter interface instead of DatabaseMetaData.getPrimaryKeys(). Primary keys sequence is not predictable when using filter. See FAQ.
Ability to plug custom IDENTITY column detection strategy for InsertIdentityOperation when using user defined types. See FAQ.
Added DefaultTableFilter class, which combines capability of the Include/ExcludeTableFilter classes.

release.description: Major release.
release.action: Mavenized the build and the website!
Now use SAX2 instead of Electric XML DOM parser. Streamed mode allows importing and exporting very large XML datasets with minimal memory consumption.
Flat XML dataset validation.

New ITableIterator interface used to iterate thru dataset tables. Allows lazy tables initialization for some dataset implementations. The IDataSet.getTables method have been deprecated and usage should be avoided.
Global System properties are not supported anymore. You must now use the new DatabaseConfig object to alter DbUnit behaviours.
Configurable data type factory to easily integrates new data types with the DbUnit core. Factory implementations available for some database vendors. Submit your own!
Oracle TIMESTAMP data type support via the OracleDataTypeFactory.
Fix truncated Oracle DATE. Must use the OracleDataTypeFactory.
Fix for Oracle CLOB greater than 4000 bytes. Must use the OracleDataTypeFactory.
MySQL 'longtext' data type support via the MySqlDataTypeFactory.
DB2 XML data types support via the Db2DataTypeFactory.
Database views support.
New pluggable filter strategies for DataSetFilter. You can now exclude/include tables using wildcard patterns.
Ability to sort tables by their dependencies with the new DatabaseSequenceFilter strategy.
New ReplacementDataSet decorator, which can replace decorated dataset values on the fly. Can be used with flat XML dataset as a new way to specify null values.
New XlsDataSet. An MS Excel dataset implementation. Uses the Jakarta POI package.
Assertion.assertEquals is now performing typed comparison instead of string representation comparison.

INSERT, CLEAN_INSERT and REFRESH operations do not override database default values anymore with null values. Null values are now omitted from insert statements. Operations use multiple prepared statements for the same table, when null values vary from row to row.

Moved InsertIdentityOperation to "org.dbunit.ext.mssql" package to be consistent with other vendor extensions. Temporary keep a deprecated copy in "org.dbunit.operation.mssqlserver" to ease transition to DbUnit 2.
786543 - NULL primitive values incorrectly returned as zero (0).
Fix Oracle CLOB values incorrectly returned as NULL.
DatabaseDataSet improvements: faster access to metadata cache and keep original database table ordering.

Better handling of the various data types in general. WARNING! New abstract methods have been added to the DataType class. This change may break your environment if you have implemented your own data types.
More efficient XmlDataSet writing. Now put values in CData block only when necessary.
Do not enable batched statement by default anymore. Many JDBC drivers have problems with this feature.
Fixed table name issue with case sensitive database.

615636 & 735095 - Incorrect XML encoding. Better handling of the XML encoding while writing and reading XML datasets. InputStream and OutputStream methods in XML dataset implementations are no more deprecated.
736439 - Problems with InsertOperation and triggers.
736967 - Wrong scale for numeric value with the jConnect driver for Sybase ASE.
Fixed DELETE operation that was not deleting tables in reverse order as expected.
712329 - setObject fails on BEA JDriver for MS-SQL.
DbUnitTask DTD export optimization.
REFRESH operation optimization.
Multiple bugfixes.
533321 - DbUnit is now case insensitive.
555455- Supports table names escaping (see escapePattern property).
551925 - Allows duplicate table names in datasets. A new method, getTables(), have been added in the IDataSet interface.
590245 & 684610 - New Reader and Writers methods to read and write XML datasets. InputStream and OutputStream methods are now deprecated.
New SortedTable and SortedDataSet decorator classes.
645691 - Added the <classpath> nested element in DbUnitTask ant task; used to load the JDBC classes.
Added <query> nested element in DbUnitTask <export>. Allows exporting the result of a SELECT as a table of a dataset. See ant task documentation.
New Canoo Webtest integration guide.
DbUnitTask for Ant contributed by Timothy Ruppert and Ben Cox.
Moved the Base64 class to the org.dbunit.util package because Visual Age for Java is not able to handle classes located in the default package.
Added system properties documentation.
542034 - Detect ambiguous table names.
542462 - Added a system property to disable usage of batch statement even if the target database support it..
545238 - Sort tables prior to comparing them. DbUnit now generates an ORDER BY clause in the select statement used by DatabaseDataSet.getTable(). Rows are sorted by primary keys.
554249 - None column values.
Added support for BLOB and CLOB data types.
Added support for binary data types: BINARY, VARBINARY and LONGVARBINARY. Binary data is persisted in xml datasets using the base64 encoding scheme.
Deprecated the DataSetUtils.assertEquals() methods. You should now use Assertion.assertEquals().
533537 - FlatXmlDataSet and null values.
533537 - Problem with single quotes.
534810 - Problem when primary key include all columns
Added support for multiple schemas per connection. See FAQ document.
Removed element <none/> from dataset.dtd. This feature was incompatible with future support for the binary data types.
530998 - DataSetUtils.AssertEquals(ITable table, ITable table).
533540 - Problem with DATE, TIME and TIMESTAMP.
Added the flat XML dataset format. See the FlatXmlDataSet in Core Components document.
Added database data verification feature. See Getting Started document.
Updated Electric XML parser to version 3.2.

Connections are now closed in each setUp() and tearDown(). You must override the DatabaseTestCase.closeConnection() and provide an empty body to modify this behavior. This is not recommended to bypass connection close if you use connection pooling.
Added the IDatabaseConnection interface.
Added the DatabaseDataSourceConnection class. This class provides support for accessing JDBC connections from a DataSource. JDBC connections are requested on demand from the DataSource.
Multiple performance improvement.
526235 - Cannot export tables with JDBC-ODBC bridge and MS-SQL.

release.description: Initial public release.
